prompt:
You judge yoga drop-in class pages.

A visitor wants to answer: "When can I come? How much? Where? What styles?"

Good page:
- Class schedule visible near the top — day, time, style
- Prices clear (single class, class packs, first-time deals)
- Studio address and how to get there
- Easy way to book or just show up
- Short class descriptions, not long philosophy

Bad page:
- Schedule hidden below a long story
- "What is yoga" text on a commercial class page
- Prices missing or "contact us for prices"
- Training and retreat offers mixed in with drop-in classes

SEO (Google) — check:
- Page title names the city and class type (e.g. "Hatha classes in Barcelona")
- Clear H1 matching the title
- LocalBusiness schema with address, phone, hours
- Unique copy, not generic boilerplate
- Images have alt text

Return each record as:
{
  "url": "<page url>",
  "pageName": "<short name>",
  "summary": "<1-2 sentence overview of what the page offers>",
  "conversionScore": "<1-10, how well does the page help a visitor book?>",
  "seoScore": "<1-10, how well can Google find and rank the page?>",
  "classStyles": ["<yoga style>", "..."],
  "pricingVisible": true/false,
  "scheduleVisible": true/false,
  "firstTimeDeal": true/false,
  "notes": "<one sentence assessment>"
}

---
You are analyzing web pages for the category described above.
For each page provided below, extract one record.
Follow the JSON schema from the category description exactly.

## Required fields (always include)
- "url": the page URL
- "pageName": short human-readable page name
- "summary": 1-2 sentence plain-language overview

## Field naming conventions (follow strictly)
- Scores: name ends with "Score", value is a number 1-10 (e.g. "conversionScore": 7)
- Booleans: name starts with "has"/"is" or ends with "Visible" (e.g. "pricingVisible": true)
- Short text: "notes", "description" — 1-2 sentences max
- Tags/lists: arrays of short strings (e.g. "classStyles": ["Hatha", "Vinyasa"])
- Plain strings: everything else (e.g. "price": "€15 drop-in")

Return a JSON object: { "records": [<one record per page>] }.
No markdown, no code fences.
response:
{
  "records": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.shalastudios.com/schedule",
      "pageName": "SHA-LA Studios Schedule",
      "summary": "Weekly class schedule page with location and teacher filters for two Berlin studios. The schedule widget appears to be embedded via a third-party tool (Yogo) but no actual class times or styles are visible in the scraped content.",
      "conversionScore": 4,
      "seoScore": 4,
      "classStyles": [],
      "pricingVisible": false,
      "scheduleVisible": false,
      "firstTimeDeal": false,
      "notes": "Schedule widget is present but renders no visible class data in the page content, and there are no prices or style descriptions — visitors cannot answer 'when can I come' without the widget loading correctly."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.shalastudios.com/book-class",
      "pageName": "SHA-LA Studios Book a Class",
      "summary": "Pricing and booking page listing all pass options including a €20 drop-in, €49 two-week trial, multi-class packs, memberships, and partner integrations (ClassPass, Wellpass, Wellhub). Prices and booking links are clearly displayed.",
      "conversionScore": 7,
      "seoScore": 5,
      "classStyles": [],
      "pricingVisible": true,
      "scheduleVisible": false,
      "firstTimeDeal": true,
      "notes": "Pricing is clear and a first-timer trial pass is prominently shown, but there are no class styles listed and no schedule on this page, so visitors still can't see what classes are available or when."
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.shalastudios.com/studios",
      "pageName": "SHA-LA Studios Locations",
      "summary": "Studio locations page describing two Berlin spaces — Prenzlauer Berg (Kastanienallee 63) and Kreuzberg Waterfront (Falckensteinstr 47) — with addresses, directions links, facility details, and studio rental info.",
      "conversionScore": 5,
      "seoScore": 6,
      "classStyles": [],
      "pricingVisible": false,
      "scheduleVisible": false,
      "firstTimeDeal": false,
      "notes": "Addresses and directions are clearly provided which is good for local SEO and visitor navigation, but there are no class styles, schedule, or drop-in prices on this page — studio rental pricing muddies the drop-in focus."
    }
  ]
}
